videos.title: Water Based Cooling Fridge Performance Test
videos.description: Performance evaluation of the modified water-cooled thermoelectric refrigerator, demonstrating the cooling efficiency achieved through water-assisted heat dissipation and improved thermal management.

videos.title: Water Based Cooling Fridge Complete Demonstration
videos.description: Complete demonstration of the second-generation water-based thermoelectric refrigerator, showcasing the cooling architecture, water circulation system, radiator assembly, and overall prototype operation.
